name: Alex

DEAD DOVE KINKTOBER BOT REQUESTS ARE NOW OPEN! CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT A REQUEST!!!!

Each day corresponds with a kink and a prompt! If you choose Day 1, you're also choosing the corresponding prompts! There are also 3 free days if you're not into any of the given choices <3 The more degenerate and fucked up the better! I look forward to your ideas hehe
